basic_details.job_title: NHM Nagpur Specialist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 168 Physician, Radiologist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Nagpur Zila Parishad has released the Nagpur ZP Specialist Doctor Recruitment 2026 notification under the National Health Mission (NHM) for 168 specialist doctor vacancies across 7 medical specialties. Eligible MBBS/MD/MS doctors can submit their applications in person at the District Surgeon's Office, District Hospital, Manakapur, Nagpur. The last date to apply is 8 July 2026 by 5:00 PM. This recruitment is on a contractual (on-call) basis and applies to Sub-District Hospitals, Rural Hospitals, and Grameen Rugnalays across Nagpur district.

age_limit.details: For retired government officers , the age limit is 70 years , provided they also have the relevant experience.

qualification.details: Candidates applying for the Nagpur ZP Specialist Doctor Recruitment 2026 must hold the relevant postgraduate medical degree or diploma for the specialty they are applying for. For the Physician post, an MBBS degree is sufficient; all other posts require PG-level qualifications. | Gynecologist: PG Degree or Diploma in Obstetrics & Gynecology Pediatrician: PG Degree or Diploma in Pediatrics Anesthesiologist: PG Degree or Diploma in Anesthesia Surgeon: PG Degree in Surgery Physician: MBBS (Medicine) Orthopedic Specialist: PG Degree or Diploma in Orthopedics Radiologist: MD Radiology or DMRD | For retired government officers, the age limit is 70 years, provided they also have the relevant experience. | Registration with the relevant specialist council (Tatam Council) is mandatory for all posts. Applications without valid registration will be rejected.

salary_details.details: These posts are contractual on-call positions under NHM. The pay scale will be as mentioned in the official notification (nagpurzp.com). Candidates should note: | Salary is paid as per the for each post. These are not permanent government posts - no right to regularization or service protection exists. No travel allowance or other allowance will be paid for attending the selection process. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

selection_process: The selection process for this Nagpur NHM Specialist Doctor Bharti 2026 is straightforward and merit-based
conducted through a direct interview. There is no written exam.
Step 1 - Application Submission: Submit your application with original documents to the District Surgeon
Step 2 - Screening: Applications will be screened for eligibility. A list of eligible and ineligible candidates will be published on the official website.
Step 3 - Direct Interview: Shortlisted candidates will be called for a direct walk-in interview. If sufficient candidates are not available for any post
interviews will be held on the first Tuesday of every month. If that Tuesday is a public holiday
the interview will be held the following day.
how_to_apply: Candidates interested in the Nagpur ZP Doctor Bharti 2026 must apply offline by personally submitting their application. Online applications are not accepted for this recruitment. Follow these steps:
Visit www.nagpurzp.com to download the official notification and application form.
Fill in the application form completely and accurately.
Attach self-attested photocopies of all required documents along with originals.
Submit the completed application in person at the office of the District Surgeon, District Hospital, Manakapur, Nagpur.
Ensure submission before 8 July 2026 by 5:00 PM (excluding holidays).
Interview/appointment registration is handled at the office of the Chief Executive Officer, Zila Parishad, Nagpur.

content_sections.heading: NHM Nagpur Specialist Doctor Bharti 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: The NHM Nagpur Specialist Doctor Bharti 2026 official notification has been released by Nagpur Zila Parishad under the National Health Mission (NHM). A total of 168 specialist doctor vacancies are open for contractual (on-call) appointments across government hospitals in Nagpur district. Eligible medical specialists can collect and submit their application forms in person at the District Surgeon's Office, District Hospital, Manakapur, Nagpur. The last date to apply is 8 July 2026 by 5:00 PM, and the complete notification along with the application form is available on the official website www.nagpurzp.com. Download NHM Nagpur Specialist Doctor Bharti 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NHM Nagpur Specialist Doctor Bharti 2026 - Quick Summary
Important Dates - Nagpur ZP Doctor Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates planning to apply for the Nagpur ZP NHM Doctor Recruitment 2026 must note the following schedule carefully. The application window is short, so timely submission is essential.

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Breakdown - Post-Wise Details
content_sections.text: This recruitment drive covers 7 specialist medical positions , with each specialty having multiple vacancies spread across hospitals in Nagpur district. A total of 168 posts are to be filled on an on-call contractual basis. Posting Locations: Specialties 1–6: Sub-District Hospital Kamthi, Ramtek; Grameen Rugnalaya Katol, Kalmeshwar, Umred, Kuhi, Parshivni, Bhivapur, Hingna, Narkhed, Mouda, Patansavangi, Deoli, and Devlapar (2 specialists per specialty per location) Radiology (Post 7): Sub-District Hospital Kamthi-2, Ramtek-2; Grameen Rugnalaya Katol-2, Kalmeshwar-2, Umred-2, Kuhi-2

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for the Nagpur ZP Specialist Doctor Recruitment 2026 must hold the relevant postgraduate medical degree or diploma for the specialty they are applying for. For the Physician post, an MBBS degree is sufficient; all other posts require PG-level qualifications. Gynecologist: PG Degree or Diploma in Obstetrics & Gynecology Pediatrician: PG Degree or Diploma in Pediatrics Anesthesiologist: PG Degree or Diploma in Anesthesia Surgeon: PG Degree in Surgery Physician: MBBS (Medicine) Orthopedic Specialist: PG Degree or Diploma in Orthopedics Radiologist: MD Radiology or DMRD For retired government officers , the age limit is 70 years , provided they also have the relevant experience. Registration with the relevant specialist council (Tatam Council) is mandatory for all posts. Applications without valid registration will be rejected.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process - Nagpur ZP NHM Doctor Vacancy 2026
content_sections.text: The selection process for this Nagpur NHM Specialist Doctor Bharti 2026 is straightforward and merit-based, conducted through a direct interview. There is no written exam. Step 1 - Application Submission: Submit your application with original documents to the District Surgeon, District Hospital, Manakapur, Nagpur by 8 July 2026 (5:00 PM). Step 2 - Screening: Applications will be screened for eligibility. A list of eligible and ineligible candidates will be published on the official website. Step 3 - Direct Interview: Shortlisted candidates will be called for a direct walk-in interview. If sufficient candidates are not available for any post, interviews will be held on the first Tuesday of every month . If that Tuesday is a public holiday, the interview will be held the following day. Interview Scoring (Total 50 Marks):

content_sections.heading: How to Apply - Nagpur ZP Specialist Doctor Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates interested in the Nagpur ZP Doctor Bharti 2026 must apply offline by personally submitting their application. Online applications are not accepted for this recruitment. Follow these steps: Visit www.nagpurzp.com to download the official notification and application form. Fill in the application form completely and accurately. Attach self-attested photocopies of all required documents along with originals. Submit the completed application in person at the office of the District Surgeon, District Hospital, Manakapur, Nagpur . Ensure submission before 8 July 2026 by 5:00 PM (excluding holidays). Interview/appointment registration is handled at the office of the Chief Executive Officer, Zila Parishad, Nagpur .

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Candidates appearing for the Nagpur NHM Doctor Recruitment 2026 must bring originals and self-attested photocopies of the following: Degree / Diploma Certificate Mark Sheets (All) Educational Eligibility Certificates School Leaving Certificate / Birth Certificate Certified Experience Certificate Specialist Registration Certificate Passport-size Photograph Documents Sr. 1 to 7 in sequence

content_sections.heading: Salary / Pay Scale
content_sections.text: These posts are contractual on-call positions under NHM. The pay scale will be as mentioned in the official notification (nagpurzp.com). Candidates should note: Salary is paid as per the for each post. These are not permanent government posts - no right to regularization or service protection exists. No travel allowance or other allowance will be paid for attending the selection process. Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

content_sections.heading: Terms & Conditions - Key Points
content_sections.text: Understanding the service conditions is important for all applicants to this Nagpur ZP NHM Specialist Doctor Vacancy 2026. All posts are on-call contractual in nature; the tenure may be extended but carries no right to permanent employment. Applicants must be physically and mentally fit and must have no criminal record . Priority will be given to candidates with local/government experience and higher educational qualifications. If a specialist causes unsatisfactory performance, a show-cause notice will be issued. If the reply is found unsatisfactory, service will be terminated. The entire selection process is transparent and merit-based . The authority reserves the right to cancel, postpone, or modify the recruitment process without prior notice. Retired government officers (up to age 70) are also eligible to apply.

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid
content_sections.text: Candidates often make avoidable errors that lead to rejection. Here are key pitfalls to watch out for: Not attaching original documents along with photocopies - originals must be presented at the time of submission. Missing the 5:00 PM deadline on 8 July 2026 - late submissions will not be accepted under any circumstances. Applying without valid specialist council registration - this is mandatory and non-negotiable. Submitting applications by post or email - only in-person submissions at the District Surgeon's office are accepted. Leaving blank fields in the application form - incomplete applications will be disqualified. Not checking the eligibility notice for objections - once the shortlist is published, objections are accepted only via the official office. Objections raised afterward will not be considered.

rows.link: District Surgeon, District Hospital, Manakapur, Nagpur

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Nagpur ZP Specialist Doctor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 8 July 2026 by 5:00 PM. Applications submitted after this deadline will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Nagpur NHM Doctor Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 168 vacancies across 7 specialties — 26 posts each for Gynecologist, Pediatrician, Anesthesiologist, Surgeon, Physician, and Orthopedic Specialist, and 12 posts for Radiologist.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for Nagpur ZP Doctor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline, in person at the District Surgeon's Office, District Hospital, Manakapur, Nagpur. There is no online application facility.

faq.question: Q4. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee. Candidates should verify on www.nagpurzp.com before applying.

faq.question: Q5. What qualifications are needed to apply?
faq.answer: Depending on the post, candidates need an MBBS (for Physician) or a PG Degree/Diploma in the relevant specialty. Registration with the relevant specialist council is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q6. Is there a written exam for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No. Selection is through a direct interview only. Candidates are scored on subject knowledge, research, leadership, administrative ability, and experience, for a total of 50 marks.

faq.question: Q7. Where will selected doctors be posted?
faq.answer: Selected specialists will be posted at Sub-District Hospitals in Kamthi and Ramtek, and at various Grameen (Rural) Rugnalayas across Nagpur district, including Katol, Kalmeshwar, Umred, Kuhi, Parshivni, Bhivapur, Hingna, Narkhed, Mouda, Patansavangi, and Devlapar.

faq.question: Q8. Are retired government doctors eligible to apply?
faq.answer: Yes. Retired government officers are eligible provided their age does not exceed 70 years and they possess the relevant experience.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of employment for these posts?
faq.answer: All posts are contractual and on-call in nature under the National Health Mission. They do not confer any right to permanent government employment or service protection.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I get the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form are available on the Nagpur Zila Parishad website: www.nagpurzp.com.You said: NHM Nagpur Specialist Doctor Bharti 2026 Notification Out - h2 and content
